docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO, MATT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DESOTO, MATT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SALMON, DIANE CROSS COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SALMON, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO, MATT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF/ CROSS DEFENDANT DIANE SALMON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/ CROSS PLAINTIFF MATT DESOTO IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MARIA MORENTI. DEFENDANT CROSS COMPLAINT FILED ON 9-28-2022, FILING IS UNTIMELY ALSO NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE ON DEFENDANT CROSS COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF/ CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE TO MOVE FORWARD FOR HEARING. DEFENDANT/ CROSS PLAINTIFF INFORMS COURTROOM CLERK REGARDING OF A RESTRAINING ORDER THAT WAS REFILED BY HIM YESTERDAY AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF/ CROSS DEFENDANT. COURT IN RECESS AT 2:42 PM AND RESUMED AT 3:04 PM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEPUTY SINGH AND DEPUTY TAUSCHER. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DEFENDANT/ CROSS PLAINTIFF INFORMS COURTROOM CLERK REGARDING OF A RESTRAINING ORDER THAT WAS REFILED BY HIM YESTERDAY AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF/ CROSS DEFENDANT. COURT IN RECESS AT 2:42 PM AND RESUMED AT 3:04 PM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEPUTY SINGH AND DEPUTY TAUSCHER. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
